examples.title: Algorithm: Fetch-Decode-Execute Cycle
examples.code:
ALGORITHM FetchDecodeExecute
INPUT: instruction
OUTPUT: result

BEGIN
 FETCH instruction from memory
 DECODE instruction
 EXECUTE instruction
 UPDATE program counter
END
examples.explanation: Step-by-step explanation of the fetch-decode-execute cycle

examples.title: Python: Interrupt Handling Process

class InterruptHandler:
 def __init__(self):
 self.interrupts = []

 def handle_interrupt(self, interrupt):

 # Execute ISR
 # Restore saved state

 pass

# Example usage
handler = InterruptHandler()
interrupt = 'hardware_interrupt'
handler.handle_interrupt(interrupt)
